prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: He Knows I Bake at Midnight
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a lake bell ringing without wind
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: boat key, snow globe, unopened letter

Cast:
- Claire Bell | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.18 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; once left town without explaining why
- Mara Sutton | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=marina manager | threat_aura=0.27 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night; covered for someone out of shame
- Wyatt Dane | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.45 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; knows about a half sibling no one asked for

- Sienna Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Mara Sutton is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Claire Bell says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Alder Ridge.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Mara?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Jenna. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Claire. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The boat key is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Noah."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
